name: Spencer Charlton
abilities: ★ The Calamity of '24 — mid-round at the Open, the course claimed him. He no longer marks the date as the Bayfield Open — only as "the anniversary." And, by all accounts, not the first time.

Former Glory. A dynasty, once — Pairs Champion three years running ('19, '20, '21) and 2022's overall net champion — before his game, and his luck, went cold. Still a stick, index 8; still late for the 9am shuttle.
flavor: “I'll no longer think of it as the Bayfield Open. I'll think of it as the anniversary that I shit myself.”
caption: Spencer Charlton · Truffle Hogs 🐗
